$comment: Canonical arrow (edge-type) registry for the Metabolian atlas. Consumed by BOTH the data validator and the web renderer so that every relationship type has one authoritative visual + semantic definition. This is the 'define an arrow for everything' foundation. Colors are design tokens resolved in the web theme (see web/src/styles/tokens.css).

categories.mass: Mass flow — how atoms move through reactions (substrate/product/cofactor).
categories.catalytic: Which protein machinery drives a reaction.
categories.regulatory: Signals that speed up or slow down a reaction/enzyme without being consumed.
categories.covalent: Post-translational / covalent modification of a protein target.
categories.transport: Movement of species across membranes/compartments and electron flow.

reversible.label: Reversible conversion
reversible.head: triangle-both
reversible.description: Reaction that proceeds in both directions under physiological conditions.

cofactor.label: Cofactor
cofactor.head: vee
cofactor.description: Non-protein helper (metal ion, prosthetic group) required for catalysis.

coenzyme-couple.label: Coenzyme couple
coenzyme-couple.head: curve
coenzyme-couple.description: Recycled redox/energy carrier pair (NAD+/NADH, ATP/ADP, FAD/FADH2, NADP+/NADPH).

spontaneous.label: Spontaneous (non-enzymatic)
spontaneous.head: open
spontaneous.description: Conversion that occurs without enzyme catalysis.

catalysis.label: Catalyzes
catalysis.head: circle
catalysis.description: Enzyme or enzyme complex that catalyzes the reaction.

transport-catalysis.label: Transports
transport-catalysis.head: circle
transport-catalysis.description: Transporter protein that moves a species across a membrane.

activation.label: Activation
activation.head: triangle
activation.description: Increases activity of the target enzyme/reaction.

inhibition.label: Inhibition
inhibition.head: tee
inhibition.description: Decreases activity of the target enzyme/reaction.

allosteric-activation.label: Allosteric activation
allosteric-activation.head: triangle
allosteric-activation.description: Effector binds a site distinct from the active site and increases activity.

allosteric-inhibition.label: Allosteric inhibition
allosteric-inhibition.head: tee
allosteric-inhibition.description: Effector binds a distinct site and decreases activity.

competitive-inhibition.label: Competitive inhibition
competitive-inhibition.head: tee
competitive-inhibition.description: Inhibitor competes with substrate for the active site.

noncompetitive-inhibition.label: Non-competitive inhibition
noncompetitive-inhibition.head: tee
noncompetitive-inhibition.description: Inhibitor lowers Vmax regardless of substrate concentration.

feedback-inhibition.label: Feedback inhibition
feedback-inhibition.head: tee
feedback-inhibition.description: End product of a pathway inhibits an upstream committed step.

feedforward-activation.label: Feedforward activation
feedforward-activation.head: triangle
feedforward-activation.description: Upstream metabolite activates a downstream step in advance.

phosphorylation.label: Phosphorylation
phosphorylation.head: diamond
phosphorylation.description: Kinase adds a phosphoryl group, changing target activity.

covalent-modification.label: Covalent modification
covalent-modification.head: diamond
covalent-modification.description: Other PTMs: acetylation, methylation, ubiquitination, glycosylation, SUMOylation, ADP-ribosylation.

hormonal-signal.label: Hormonal / signaling input
hormonal-signal.head: vee
hormonal-signal.description: Hormone or second messenger that reroutes flux (insulin, glucagon, cAMP, AMPK state).

transport.label: Transport / translocation
transport.head: vee
transport.description: Species crosses a membrane between compartments.

electron-transfer.label: Electron transfer
electron-transfer.head: vee
electron-transfer.description: Electron flow in redox chains (ETC, ferredoxin, quinones).

transcriptional-activation.label: Transcriptional activation
transcriptional-activation.head: triangle
transcriptional-activation.description: Transcription factor induces expression of a gene.

transcriptional-repression.label: Transcriptional repression
transcriptional-repression.head: tee
transcriptional-repression.description: Transcription factor represses expression of a gene.

complex-formation.label: Complex subunit
complex-formation.head: none
complex-formation.description: Protein is a subunit of a larger complex.

isozyme.label: Isozyme / paralog
isozyme.head: none
isozyme.description: Enzymes catalyzing the same reaction with different tissue/kinetic profiles.

pathway-membership.label: Pathway membership
pathway-membership.head: none
pathway-membership.description: Element belongs to a named pathway module.

crosstalk.label: Pathway crosstalk
crosstalk.head: vee-both
crosstalk.description: A shared metabolite or signal that couples two pathways.

microbiome-host.label: Microbiome–host exchange
microbiome-host.head: vee-both
microbiome-host.description: Metabolite produced by gut microbiota that feeds host metabolism (or vice versa).
